qa_pairs.question: Which clusters are considered general-purpose clusters by the Alliance?
qa_pairs.answer: The general-purpose clusters mentioned by the Alliance are Rorqual, Fir, Nibi, and Narval.

qa_pairs.question: For Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) awards on general-purpose clusters, who automatically has access to a Principal Investigator's (PI's) allocation?
qa_pairs.answer: By default, every role sponsored by the Principal Investigator through their Alliance CCDB registration, along with any co-PIs listed on the RAC application, will automatically have access to the RAC award on general-purpose clusters.
